summary: Full end-to-end testing of Neural Axis B2B website. All backend APIs and frontend flows tested and working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: React console error: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - setState called during render in AdminLogin. Functional but causes React warning.

issues: Section with 'Track Record' content uses id='about' not id='track-record'. Minor naming inconsistency.

action_items: LOW: Fix React setState-during-render warning in AdminLogin component (use useEffect or callback instead of direct setState during render)
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLogin has a React setState-during-render issue (console error visible) - fix by using useEffect for auth redirect logic
Section ID mismatch: 'Track Record' section has id='about' not 'track-record' - minor but could affect future nav links
JWT cookies set with secure=False - should be True in production HTTPS environments
seed_data_creation: Created test leads during testing: TEST Dean Smith, TEST_Update Lead, TEST_Dean John - all visible in admin dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested and passing. Backend: auth (login/logout/me/refresh), leads CRUD (create/list/stats/update/delete/filter) - all 13 tests pass. Frontend: Homepage (hero/technologies/solutions/about/contact sections), contact form submission with select dropdown + success toast, admin login -> dashboard redirect, lead table with filter buttons (New/Contacted/All work correctly), lead detail dialog opens on row click, action menu (3-dot) shows View Details + Delete options. Minor issue: React setState warning in AdminLogin. Mocked: Resend email notifications (RESEND_API_KEY not set).
mocked_apis: Resend email notifications - gracefully skipped when RESEND_API_KEY not set
